Video.summary: For many first-time homeowners, decorating - especially private spaces like the bedroom - is definitely last on the list. That's certainly the case for Tiffany, an up and coming PR executive. By refreshing some of Tiffany's vintage furniture and bringing in some modern pieces and sustainable choices, host Samantha Pynn takes Tiffany's dorm-like bedroom with its mish-mash of furnishings and transforms it into an eclectic and soothing space, full of the sophistication a professional woman deserves.
Video.title: Pure Design: Tiffany's Bedroom

Image.alt: Pure Design: Tiffany's Bedroom
Pure Design: Tiffany's Bedroom

Video.summary: Jane crashes the craft rooms of America's most talented and creative makers. In this episode, Jane plays piano with the music man.
Video.title: Craft Room Crash: Let's Make Something Pretty - Little Handmade Piano

Craft Room Crash: Let's Make Something Pretty - Little Handmade Piano

Craft Room Crash: Let's Go Make Something! - Coaster Gifts

Video.summary: Beth is a busy, successful, single executive whose life consists of five-star hotels, gourmet restaurants and VIP airport lounges. But her own house, a midtown Toronto duplex, doesn't measure up. As a result, she feels more at home on the road than in her own house. Designer Samantha Pynn uses silks, metallic wallpaper, glass tabletops and mirrored doors to transform Beth's dowdy living quarters into a glamorous and luxurious space.
Video.title: Pure Design: Beth's Dining Room

Image.alt: Pure Design: Beth's Dining Room
Pure Design: Beth's Dining Room

Video.summary: Designer Samantha Pynn creates an eco-fabulous bedroom for 16-year-old Lindsay that perfectly balances youthful without looking childish - and still allows for room to grow.
Video.title: Pure Design: Lindsay's Teenage Bedroom

Image.alt: Pure Design: Lindsay's Teenage Bedroom
Pure Design: Lindsay's Teenage Bedroom

Video.summary: Teaching you the best material and way to cut felt with your cricut machine to create a tic tac toe pattern!
Video.title: Amy Makes That: Tic Tac Toe Felt Cricut Project

Image.alt: Amy Makes That: Tic Tac Toe Felt Cricut Project
Amy Makes That: Tic Tac Toe Felt Cricut Project

Image.alt: Craft Room Crash: The Holiday Episode - Easter Bunny Wall Art
Craft Room Crash: The Holiday Episode - Easter Bunny Wall Art

Video.summary: Terina creates a camp rules chalkboard.
Video.title: Create with Tree That's Me: Camping Rules

Image.alt: Create with Tree That's Me: Camping Rules
Create with Tree That's Me: Camping Rules

Video.summary: Claudia and Justin are professional foodies - he's a chef and she's a food stylist. So it's no surprise that their urban loft space has a beautifully designed modern kitchen. Only problem is, the rest of the space doesn't measure up: it's a mishmash of Danish modern with other inherited and found pieces. Designer Samantha Pynn uses their showpiece kitchen as an inspiration and by recovering older teak pieces with eco-friendly fabrics and redoing the floor plan.
Video.title: Pure Design: Claudia & Justin's Living/Dining Room

Image.alt: Pure Design: Claudia & Justin's Living/Dining Room
Pure Design: Claudia & Justin's Living/Dining Room

Video.summary: Many brides-to-be are asking How to Make Wedding Invitations and Programs that are unique enough to reflect their style but don't cost an arm and a leg. That's where this DIY wedding video tutorial comes in. Learn how to use embossing and die cutting techniques to make absolutely adorable and spring-themed wedding invitations and programs. Wedding crafts like the ones featured in this DIY craft video help you save money while still adding a personal touch to your big, beautiful day.
Video.title: FaveCrafts: How to Make Wedding Invitations and Programs

Image.alt: FaveCrafts: How to Make Wedding Invitations and Programs
FaveCrafts: How to Make Wedding Invitations and Programs

FaveCrafts: Ribbons DIY Wreath

Video.summary: Have you always wanted to learn how to Sew? Well now's your chance to have a lesson in the comfort of your own home. This easy to follow step by step programme will teach you the basics to get strated and then move on to some simple projects such as making a lined tote bag to practise what you have learnt. You will find out what equipment you'll need, larn some brilliant tips to make beautiful creations including a patchwork cushion and elasticated skirt!
Video.title: Learn to Sew

Image.alt: Learn to Sew
Learn to Sew

Video.summary: Join DIY expert and mom, Lynn Lilly as she welcomes creatives, chefs, moms and entrepreneurs to the Craft Box Girls Studio. It's Lynn's Birthday and what better way to celebrate than with Healthy Chef and Partyologist, Nancy Waldeck.
Video.title: Creative Living with Lynn Lilly: Lynn's Birthday Celebrations

Image.alt: Creative Living with Lynn Lilly: Lynn's Birthday Celebrations
Creative Living with Lynn Lilly: Lynn's Birthday Celebrations

Video.summary: Join DIY expert and mom, Lynn Lilly as she welcomes creatives, chefs, moms and entrepreneurs to the Craft Box Girls Studio. Today we take a walk on the wild side with a craft inspired by American writer and illustrator Maurice Sendak's 1963 children's book, "Where the Wild Things Are."
Video.title: Creative Living with Lynn Lilly: Where the Wild Things Are

Image.alt: Creative Living with Lynn Lilly: Where the Wild Things Are
Creative Living with Lynn Lilly: Where the Wild Things Are

Video.summary: Our Dolls LOVE Slime sooooo much we just had to make them their very own SLIME WorkShop!! Check out this Fabulous & Slimy Craft is perfect for your Slime Loving Dolls!
